---
title: Software
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(pkgmeta)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)
library(dplyr)

extract_names <- function(author_text) {
  author_text |>
    str_remove_all("\\s*\\[[^\\]]*\\]|\\s*\\([^)]*\\)") |>
    str_split(",\\s*") |>
    pluck(1) |>
    str_trim() |>
    paste0(collapse = ", ")
}

packages <- get_meta(cran_authors = c("Lydeamore")) |>
    mutate(authors = extract_names(authors))
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: 'asis'

for (p in 1:nrow(packages)) {
    cat(
        "## ", packages$package[p], "\n\n",
        packages$description[p], "\n\n",
        "Coauthors: ", packages$authors[p], "\n\n",
        "Available on [CRAN](https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=", packages$package[p], ")\n\n",
        sep = ""
    )
}
```
